variables.name: ICEBERG_CATALOG_URI
variables.description: Iceberg REST catalog endpoint (Docker compose service)

variables.name: ICEBERG_WAREHOUSE
variables.description: Iceberg warehouse location in object storage

variables.name: S3_ACCESS_KEY
variables.description: MinIO access key for local Iceberg warehouse

variables.name: S3_SECRET_KEY
variables.description: MinIO secret key for local Iceberg warehouse

variables.name: ICEBERG_NAMESPACE
variables.description: Iceberg namespace for CRM integration test tables

variables.name: ICEBERG_TABLE
variables.description: Iceberg table name for CRM customer source
